message:
fix(command,runtime): improve subcommand error handling and add HELP subcommands

Error handling improvements:
- Add WrongSubcommandArity and UnknownSubcommand error variants to CommandError
  for Redis-accurate error messages (e.g., "ERR wrong number of arguments for
  'xgroup|create' subcommand" instead of generic arity errors)
- XGROUP, XINFO, CLUSTER, FUNCTION, and COMMAND now return proper unknown
  subcommand errors with "Try CMD HELP" guidance instead of generic SyntaxError

New HELP subcommands:
- XGROUP HELP: lists CREATE, CREATECONSUMER, DELCONSUMER, DESTROY, SETID
- XINFO HELP: lists CONSUMERS, GROUPS, STREAM

Subcommand parsing cleanup:
- XGROUP and XINFO now parse subcommand as UTF-8 string once at top for
  consistent case-insensitive matching via eq_ignore_ascii_case
- HELP subcommand arity validation added to CLUSTER and FUNCTION

Conformance fixtures updated:
- core_acl, core_client, core_config, core_connection, core_errors,
  core_function, core_generic, core_object, core_pubsub, core_server,
  core_stream: fixture adjustments for improved error message formats
- protocol_negative: new negative test cases for protocol edge cases

Runtime (fr-runtime):
- Supporting changes for improved command dispatch (136 lines changed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
